kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Between Highrow and Southgate, one goes with Aldric and the other with Matilda.
Southgate goes with at most two of Aldric, Carpenter, and 2 coins.
At most one of the artisan in Bridgegate, the artisan in Oldwall, and the artisan with 10 coins belongs to the Ironmongers' Guild.
More members of the Ironmongers' Guild are in the Hill Ward than members of the Joiners' Guild.
Bridgegate goes with exactly two of Edmund, Mason, and 4 coins.
The artisan in Bridgegate's levy is higher than both Cedric and the Carpenter.
Highrow, Millpond, and Oldwall go with Blacksmith, Tanner, and 10 coins, in some order.
Either Potter goes with 6 coins or Cedric belongs to the Ironmongers' Guild (but not both) if and only if the Tanner belongs to the North Side.
Beatrix goes with exactly two of Tanner, Southgate, and 12 coins.
Potter does not go with Matilda if and only if Riverside does not go with Weaver.
Bridgegate goes with at most two of Edmund, Mason, and 8 coins.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Between Cedarmere and Willowmere, one goes with Boone and the other with Wade.
Willowmere goes with at most two of Boone, Bluegill, and 4 lb.
At most one of the angler at Birchpool, the angler at Pinehollow, and the catch with 8 lb belongs to the Pike Family.
More members of the Pike Family are in the West Watershed than members of the Catfish Family.
Birchpool goes with exactly two of Esther, Carp, and 5 lb.
The angler at Birchpool's weight is higher than both Dale and the angler who landed the Bluegill.
Cedarmere, Grayreach, and Pinehollow go with Bass, Perch, and 8 lb, in some order.
Either Catfish goes with 6 lb or Dale belongs to the Pike Family (but not both) if and only if the angler who landed the Perch belongs to the Lowland Basin.
Cody goes with exactly two of Perch, Willowmere, and 9 lb.
Catfish does not go with Wade if and only if Stillwater does not go with Trout.
Birchpool goes with at most two of Esther, Carp, and 7 lb.
